reviews.comment:
buen lugar para comer algo en la ruta, los precios estan acomodados, hace tiempo eran bastante altos, pero no ahora. ideal y recomendado, sobre la izquierda tiene un inmensa arboleda con alguna mesa para hacer un almuerzo y un descanso de la ruta, al aire libre, muy poca gente utiliza esta parte. Por lo demas baños siempre limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to grab a bite to eat along the way. Prices are reasonable; they used to be quite high, but not anymore. Ideal and highly recommended. To the left, there's a large grove of trees with a few tables, perfect for lunch and a break from the road. Very few people use this area. The restrooms are always clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncTRQUGJBEAE
